{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/111214557?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Dimpyj1604", "id": 111214557, "login": "Dimpyj1604", "node_id": "U_kgDOBqD_3Q", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46444", "cvss": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "### FINDING 4: OpenAI Assistants Vector Store - No Auth on CRUD Operations
**Severity**: HIGH (CVSS ~8.1)
**Type**: CWE-306 (Missing Authentication for Critical Function)
**File**: `packages/server/src/routes/openai-assistants-vector-store/index.ts`

**Description**: ALL CRUD endpoints for OpenAI Assistants Vector Store have no authentication middleware AND the route path `/api/v1/openai-assistants-vector-store` is NOT in `WHITELIST_URLS`. However, it is also NOT protected by the main auth middleware when accessed via API key — the route requires API key auth (not whitelisted), but NO permission checks exist on any operation.

The real issue is that the routes have no `checkAnyPermission()` middleware, meaning any authenticated user regardless of role can:
- Create vector stores
- Upload files to vector stores
- Delete vector stores and files
- Modify any vector store

**Evidence**:
```typescript
// No permission middleware on any route
router.post('/', controller.createAssistantVectorStore)          // No permission check
router.put(['/', '/:id'], controller.updateAssistantVectorStore) // No permission check
router.delete(['/', '/:id'], controller.deleteAssistantVectorStore) // No permission check
router.post('/:id', getMulterStorage().array('files'), controller.uploadFilesToAssistantVectorStore) // No permission check
```

**Impact**: Any authenticated user can manipulate OpenAI vector stores, upload malicious files, delete data, or exfiltrate stored documents regardless of their assigned permissions.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00327, "percentile": 0.2458}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hmg2-jjjx-jcp2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-14T16:19:23Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hmg2-jjjx-jcp2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hmg2-jjjx-jcp2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46444"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-08T16:16:41Z", "published_at": "2026-05-14T16:19:23Z", "references": ["https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise/security/advisories/GHSA-hmg2-jjjx-jcp2", "https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise/releases/tag/flowise%403.1.2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46444", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hmg2-jjjx-jcp2"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/FlowiseAI/Flowise/security-advisories/GHSA-hmg2-jjjx-jcp2", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise", "summary": "FlowiseAI: Vector Store No Permission Checks", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-11T14:08:36Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hmg2-jjjx-jcp2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.1.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "flowise"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.1.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: FlowiseAI: Vector Store No Permission Checks
